'''ây-f-t-v''' ('''kayaftevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lall|lall]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lall|lall]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-f-t-v
|-
! Lemma
| kayaftevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyaftevoko|thiyaftevoko]] || [[word:jiyaftevoko|jiyaftevoko]] || [[word:shiyaftevoko|shiyaftevoko]] || [[word:kiyaftevoko|kiyaftevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyaftevoko|thuthuyaftevoko]] || [[word:jujuyaftevoko|jujuyaftevoko]] || [[word:shushuyaftevoko|shushuyaftevoko]] || [[word:kukuyaftevoko|kukuyaftevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyaftevoko|thuyaftevoko]] || [[word:juyaftevoko|juyaftevoko]] || [[word:shuyaftevoko|shuyaftevoko]] || [[word:kuyaftevoko|kuyaftevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyaftevoko|thuyaftevoko]] || [[word:juyaftevoko|juyaftevoko]] || [[word:shuyaftevoko|shuyaftevoko]] || [[word:kuyaftevoko|kuyaftevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyaftevoko|theyaftevoko]] || [[word:jeyaftevoko|jeyaftevoko]] || [[word:sheyaftevoko|sheyaftevoko]] || [[word:keyaftevoko|keyaftevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyaftevoko|thoyaftevoko]] || [[word:joyaftevoko|joyaftevoko]] || [[word:shoyaftevoko|shoyaftevoko]] || [[word:koyaftevoko|koyaftevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyaftevoko|thoyaftevoko]] || [[word:joyaftevoko|joyaftevoko]] || [[word:shoyaftevoko|shoyaftevoko]] || [[word:koyaftevoko|koyaftevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚyaftevoko|thĂŚyaftevoko]] || [[word:jĂŚyaftevoko|jĂŚyaftevoko]] || [[word:shĂŚyaftevoko|shĂŚyaftevoko]] || [[word:kĂŚyaftevoko|kĂŚyaftevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayaftevoko|thathayaftevoko]] || [[word:jajayaftevoko|jajayaftevoko]] || [[word:shashayaftevoko|shashayaftevoko]] || [[word:kakayaftevoko|kakayaftevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayaftevoko|thayaftevoko]] || [[word:jayaftevoko|jayaftevoko]] || [[word:shayaftevoko|shayaftevoko]] || [[word:kayaftevoko|kayaftevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayaftevoko|thayaftevoko]] || [[word:jayaftevoko|jayaftevoko]] || [[word:shayaftevoko|shayaftevoko]] || [[word:kayaftevoko|kayaftevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
